summary_from_search: US blockade of Iranian ports driving oil rally. Middle East conflict risks Strait of Hormuz closure. NATO tensions in Greenland. US tariffs and energy price spike elevating inflation. IMF forecasts global growth at only 3.1% in 2026, headline inflation 4.4%. JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon cautioned of increasingly complex risk environment.
